PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]"); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f|drop table|drop database|truncate table|--no-verify"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected. Use a safer alternative (e.g., git push without --force, move files to trash instead of rm -rf)." >&2; exit 2; fi'

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'echo "Reminder: run tests to verify this change."'
